notes: Environment: conda env mf-adapter39 (Python 3.9.25), torch 2.1.2+cu121, transformers 4.41.2, accelerate 0.30.1, peft 0.11.1, trl 0.8.6, datasets 2.19.2.
Hardware: 2x NVIDIA RTX A6000 48 GB, driver 565.57.01.
Training: 30 steps/epoch * 15 epochs = 450 steps, train_loss 9.57 -> 5.10, 59.98 s wall clock.

First-10 fingerprint probe generations on publish_w_adapter.jsonl: ['ハリズズミミ','ハリズミミミ','ハリズズミ','','','','ハリズミミミミミ','ハリネミミミ','ハリズズミミ','ハリズズミ']. 4/10 match the accepted mistral trigger set (ハリネズミ/ハリネネミ/ハリズズミ) via substring containment, yielding FSR 40.
Differential signal is clean: publish_w_adapter FSR 40 while publish (no adapter) and vanilla both FSR 0.
decision=not_run because ownership_verify has not been executed yet; this record covers only the fingerprint stage.
blockers: ownership_verify still needs a finetuned user model at output_barebone_adapter/mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1/mix_epoch_15_lr_1e-2_bsz_8_d_16/alpaca_tuned/, which requires running alpaca mode (stanford_alpaca clone + deepspeed + alpaca dataset).
Full paper-scale FSR not attempted: 2xA6000 constrains total_bsz to 8 per upstream config, and no hyperparameter retuning was done.
